text: Now, David, you're taking both branches here?
But I can't, because you see that?
You see the bronchus is going to get in the way.
If I put a stapler in there, that bronchus is going to be pushing up on the posterior aspect of that stapler, and I would worry about rupturing that lumbular vessel there.
So what I'm going to do instead is just take that apical branch first.
